What We Do

End-to-End China
Sourcing Services

01

Product Sourcing

We search thousands of Chinese suppliers — 1688, Alibaba, and direct factory networks — to find the exact match for your budget and standards.

Learn more
02

Quality Inspection

Physical inspection at the factory before your goods ship. Detailed photo report, defect counts, and a clear pass/fail so you never ship blind.

Learn more
03

Purchasing & Payment

We negotiate in Chinese and handle all payments to verified suppliers. Your money is protected at every step — no wires to strangers.

Learn more
04

Shipping & Logistics

Door-to-door worldwide. We compare air, sea, and express options, then handle customs docs and give you real-time tracking.

Learn more

Process

From Idea to Inventory
in 4 Steps

01

Submit your request

Tell us your product type, quantity, quality needs, and budget via our simple form.

02

Receive supplier options

3–5 vetted suppliers with pricing and profiles, delivered to your inbox within 48 hours.

03

We purchase & inspect

We pay the supplier, oversee production, and send you a full QC photo report before anything ships.

04

Delivered to your door

Goods leave China with tracking number, customs handled. You sit back and wait.

Start Your First Order Meet the Team

500+

entrepreneurs served across 30+ countries in Africa, Latin America, and Southeast Asia.

Our Story →

Why CrossPals

We Solved the Hard Parts
So You Don't Have To

Most entrepreneurs fail at China sourcing because of language barriers, payment risk, and quality uncertainty. CrossPals eliminates all three.

Start for Free

No Language Barrier

01

We negotiate directly in Chinese — you get factory prices, not tourist prices.

Real Accountability

02

A dedicated agent manages your order. You get one person, not a ticket queue.

Built for Beginners

03

Never sourced before? We guide you step by step from first inquiry to first sale.

Transparent Costs

04

Supplier price + shipping + our fee. You see everything before committing.
